title: checkout.refund function has incomplete test coverage
detect_pattern: refund function handles four cases: negative amount, expired card, and two success/failure branches; current test suite covers only the success case for a valid card; missing coverage for negative amount and expired card scenarios
agent_task: Add two test cases to checkout.test.ts: (1) refund with negative amount should return status 'failed', (2) refund with expired card should return status 'failed'. Verify test coverage report shows all branches in the refund function are reached.
expected_outcome: Test file gains two new test cases for negative amount and expired card; coverage report shows refund reaches 100% branch coverage; all tests pass
